---
title: MMM Newsletter
author: "01 | July 2026"
output:
  prettydoc::html_pretty:
    css: ["../css/cayman.css", "../css/normalize.css"]
    toc: yes
---


# Projects highlights 

## ECOLITHIC workshop 
qmfjglsfqfg
hzldkfhqsdkg

qszdghflkqsjg


## Welcoming Rebekka in ZOOGESTURES!

qsfhgqsjdklùfgq


# Recently published articles 
lozhfkdjqfmzdq
oquzhdfljdqmfj



zlifjmqsdjflmkqsd

zqldihflksqdjf


# Upcoming events 
fjqdlkjflmqsd
jfsdlqjfqsd

qsdhlfhqsdlkf
hsdqlfjhlkqsdjf
hdlofhsdlkjqfq

# Photos gallery
sjdhfjukzehg
sdhfuheri

zhfuozhqdoif
hsdofhoi
houdhfoisd
# Members achievements
